text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's summer camp begins. Serious and
dedicated to her training, she cuts off all contact
with everyone back home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's eager to better herself for the upcoming
Kikuka Sho. Her heart seems ablaze with
motivation.
